---
callout-appearance: default
callout-icon: false
format:
  html:
    toc-depth: 4
---

## FAQ

::: {.callout-warning icon="true"}
## This FAQ is a work in progress
Additional questions/tips will be added over time.
:::

::: {.callout-important icon="true"}
## I need help!
Please contact the WP7 DMP Team by clicking the {{< bi envelope >}} icon on the top-left (below the PARC logo), or by clicking {{< var people.dmpteam >}}.
:::

### General {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-note }
## What is the difference between the questions in grey, red, and green?
The questions in red/green are mandatory, the questions in grey  are optional (in this phase). Some questions will become mandatory at a later DMP phase. Optional questions are often used to clarify responses for mandatory questions with a fixed response format and/or will enrich the DMP. 
:::

### DMP Questions {.unnumbered}

#### I. Administrative information {.unnumbered} 

::: {.callout-note }
## We don’t have a link to the project proposal, what should we do?
You can link to the project proposal in the ANSES Sharepoint. In addition, WP7 will create persistent links to a FAIR summary of the project proposal which they will insert at a later stage
:::

#### II. Re-using data {.unnumbered}
#### III. Creating and collecting data {.unnumbered} 
#### IV. Processing data {.unnumbered}
#### V. Interpreting data {.unnumbered}
#### VI. Preserving data {.unnumbered}
#### VII. Giving access to data {.unnumbered}
